response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development and embedded systems, but lacks direct experience with the required C programming for embedded UNIX development, Linux kernel modifications, and networking technologies like MACsec or IEEE 802.1X. While their background in C/C++ and embedded systems is promising, the absence of security-focused embedded networking roles and Japanese language proficiency also raises concerns.
strengths: Extensive experience in embedded systems and low-level programming (C, C++, DLang)
Strong background in software development across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to work in team-driven, test-driven, and high-performance environments
concerns: No demonstrated experience with Linux kernel modifications or embedded networking security features
Minimal exposure to networking technologies (MACsec, IEEE 802.1X) or switch-chip knowledge
